Article Title: Tom Brady sends strong message on Raiders rookie Fernando Mendoza while revealing surprise WWE ambitions
Article Text:
Tom Brady sends a strong message on Fernando Mendoza

Tom Brady says Fernando Mendoza must earn his place despite growing expectations

Brady opens up about WWE ambitions after retirement

The excitement around Fernando Mendoza has been growing ever since the Las Vegas Raiders made him the No. 1 overall pick in the 2026 NFL Draft. Many fans already see him as the team's future, but minority owner Tom Brady believes expectations should remain realistic as the rookie prepares for his first NFL season.Brady also made headlines for a very different reason this week. While discussing football and life after retirement, the seven time Super Bowl champion revealed that he would be open to stepping into a WWE ring one day, adding another surprising chapter to his post playing career.Brady recently appeared on Fox Business, where he was asked about Mendoza and the attention surrounding the young quarterback. Instead of adding to the excitement, Brady stressed that success in the NFL is never guaranteed, regardless of where a player is drafted."I love Fernando, but Fernando is like every other young rookie. He's got to go out there and earn it like everybody else. And I am excited about the opportunity for our team to have him as a first overall pick. He has done a lot of hard work to get to this point."Brady explained that the biggest challenge for every rookie begins after the draft. According to him, the league quickly tests a player's mindset, work ethic and ability to respond when things do not go as planned."But at the same time, like everyone at their age, none of these young players, rookies, have ever had a meaningful snap in the NFL. Their career and journey will be determined by the work they put in, by adversities that they overcome, by the kind of teammate, team player they are."The comments come as the Raiders continue to decide how quickly Mendoza should take over the starting job. Reports have suggested veteran quarterback Kirk Cousins could begin the season as the starter while Mendoza develops behind him. However, some NFL analysts believe the rookie should start sooner if he proves to be the better option during training camp and preseason.Regardless of when Mendoza makes his debut, Brady's message was clear. Draft position creates opportunity, but long term success depends on performance, consistency and leadership inside the locker room.Away from football, Brady grabbed attention during Fanatics Fest in New York while appearing on Cody Rhodes' live podcast. The former quarterback admitted that retirement has made him curious about trying something completely different, including a possible WWE appearance."I feel like since I’m retired from football, I have an opportunity to go out there and still showcase that I’m a little bit of an athlete. You know, my boy Gronk has done it. I’ve seen Logan Paul do it. I think I could get in there for at least one match, right?"Brady followed that up with another playful message directed at WWE President Nick Khan."Come on Nick [Khan]. Make it happen!"The remarks surprised many because Brady had previously criticized professional wrestling, calling it "cute" and "scripted" earlier this year. Those comments sparked responses from WWE stars including Oba Femi, Paul Heyman and Logan Paul, who defended the physical demands of the sport.Whether a WWE match ever happens remains uncertain, but Brady continues to show that retirement has not slowed him down. As he helps shape the Raiders' future behind the scenes, he is also keeping fans guessing about what challenge he might take on next.
Article Summary: Tom brady says fernando mendoza must earn his place in the nfl. The rookie quarterback was drafted by the las vegas raiders with the no. 1 overall pick in the 2026 nfl draft. Brady also revealed that he would be open to stepping into a wwe ring one day.

Article Title: What makes Travis Kelce so special? Patrick Mahomes finally reveals the Chiefs star’s biggest hidden advantage
Article Text:
Travis Kelce and Patrick Mahomes (Getty Images)

What did Patrick Mahomes say about Travis Kelce's leadership?

How did Taylor Swift factor into Travis Kelce returning for another season?

Patrick Mahomes has never been shy about crediting Travis Kelce . But his latest comments go beyond anything you can measure in box scores. As Kelce prepares for his 14th season with the Kansas City Chiefs, Mahomes told Yahoo Sports that the tight end's most defining quality is not his athleticism or his ability to get open. It is the way his teammates feel about him. And in a league where locker rooms can fracture just as fast as they bond, that is not a small thing.Patrick Mahomes was candid about how Travis Kelce operates within the team structure. "Obviously, he has the physical gifts to go out there and be that size with that speed and looseness and catch the football," the quarterback said. But he was clear that those gifts only tell part of the story."I think what makes him who he is — the leader and the person that he is — [are] the teammates around him want him to succeed because he's gonna give everything he has for the guys around him," Mahomes said.That kind of remark carries weight precisely because Mahomes does not have to say it. Kelce's resume speaks loudly enough. But Mahomes went further, pointing to the universal respect Kelce draws from everyone who has played alongside him."I think that's something that makes him special is that, every teammate you ask about him is gonna say that's their favorite teammate because of the person that he is," he said. Mahomes also made a pointed reference to Kelce's future: "I think that's what makes him the gold jacket recipient that he will be," a nod to the Pro Football Hall of Fame induction that most consider a formality at this point.For months, retirement talk followed Travis Kelce everywhere. He addressed it head-on during a March appearance on The Pat McAfee Show, where he said he still genuinely loves being on the field. He also gave credit to Taylor Swift, his wife, for helping him see that the desire to keep playing was real, not habit."We share the same love for what we do," Kelce said. "I still love going to work, putting on the pads, grinding it out and just playing the game."He confirmed a new one-year deal with Kansas City through an Instagram post that drew an immediate response from Mahomes in the comments. Brittany Mahomes added fire emojis. The announcement had the energy of something that felt inevitable but still landed with genuine relief.Mahomes had previously admitted he tries not to assume Kelce will always be there. "Every season that I've had with him these last few years, I try to cherish because you never know," he said. That awareness has only made the return feel more significant. For Kansas City, having Kelce back is not about nostalgia. It is about keeping the core of something that has worked, intact for one more run.
Article Summary: Patrick mahomes said travis kelce's most defining quality is the way his teammates feel about him. Kelce confirmed a new one-year deal with kansas city through an instagram post. The announcement had the energy of something that felt inevitable but still landed with genuine relief.

Article Title: Rohit Sharma no more automatic selection after Lord's ODI
Article Text:
Rohit Sharma during India's ODI series against England, with his future in the format now a subject of discussion within Indian cricket.

TOI

As Rohit Sharma trudged back to the pavilion after another rusty knock of 26 off 47 balls in the second ODI against England in Cardiff on Thursday, he may have run out of time in his international career.understands that the selection committee has decided that he will not be the first-choice opener after the series which finishes with the third ODI at Lord's on Sunday. As things stand now, the match on Sunday could be the 39-year-old's last match for India.India were bowled out for 233 with Virat Kohli and Shreyas Iyer scoring fluent 65 and 66 respectively as the English pacers again exploited the Indian batting's struggles with the bouncing deliveries. On Tuesday, TOI had reported that the team management and selectors want to give younger players like Yashasvi Jaiswal a longer rope to be get ready for the ODI World Cup in South Africa in Oct-Nov 2027 and that Rohit was unlikely to get a full run if his form wasn't up to mark in this series.It is learnt that the team management and selectors wanted to give Jaiswal a full series in England but stuck with Rohit to give him another chance to rediscover his fluency. Sources say that the selection committee and the team management have conveyed their views about Rohit to the Indian cricket board ( BCCI ). It will be interesting to see if the power centres in the board speak to Rohit or the selectors have a word with him."The selectors had made up their minds to drop him after the ODI series against Afghanistan at home last month. Rohit also declined to rest for the third ODI in Chennai to give Jaiswal a look in. Eventually, captain Shubman Gill had to bat at No. 3 to accommodate Jaiswal," a BCCI source told TOI.The team management has not been pleased with Rohit's performances since replacing him with Gill as the ODI captain after the victorious Champions Trophy campaign in March 2025. TOI had reported on May 19, before the team for the Afghanistan series was picked, that BCCI was apprised about the doubts selectors and team management have about Rohit's fitness and that they were unsure he could last till the World Cup when he will be well above 40 years of age.Rohit's approach to batting completely changed after the Champions Trophy. He has been sedate and ultra-cautious in his approach. The management feels that he requires three games to get going in a series. "It was always going to be a challenge for Rohit since he retired from the other two formats. He also plays very little domestic cricket. He turned up for two Vijay Hazare Trophy matches last season, one of which was against Sikkim. He needs more time to find his rhythm. The selectors have conveyed their opinion. Now, it's up to Rohit and the board to decide how they want to go ahead with it," the source added.
Article Summary: Rohit sharma's future in odi cricket is now a subject of discussion. The 39-year-old may not be the first-choice opener after the series. The third odi at lord's on sunday could be his last match for india.

Article Title: "Being Caitlin Clark’s fiercest protector…." : Sophie Cunningham's soaring popularity sparks blunt eight-point verdict from WNBA analyst
Article Text:
WNBA analyst Jemele Hill said Sophie Cunningham's popularity extends far beyond her on-court production, noting that players averaging eight points per game rarely receive such attention. Hill credited Cunningham's outspoken personality, growing media presence and reputation as Caitlin Clark's fiercest defender. Cunningham agreed she is intentionally building her brand through podcasts, endorsements and public appearances, saying players must prepare financially for life after basketball.

Jemele Hill explains why Sophie Cunningham has become one of the WNBA 's biggest personalities

Sophie Cunningham says building her brand is part of preparing for life after basketball

Sophie Cunningham's profile has expanded far beyond basketball over the past year. The Indiana Fever guard has become one of the league's most talked-about personalities, thanks to viral moments, endorsement deals and appearances outside the sport. Her rapid rise has now prompted veteran sports journalist Jemele Hill to weigh in on why Cunningham is attracting so much attention despite modest career statistics.Cunningham's popularity has surged since joining the Indiana Fever. While she has long been known as a tough competitor, her visibility reached another level after repeatedly defending teammate Caitlin Clark during heated on-court moments.Those incidents helped shape her image as Clark's fiercest protector and introduced her to a much broader audience. Since then, Cunningham has landed a podcast, partnered with Adidas on an exclusive shoe release and even appeared as a ring girl during the co-main event of UFC 329 on July 11.Speaking on the Flagrant and Funny podcast, Jemele Hill acknowledged the unusual nature of Cunningham's rise while pointing to several factors behind it.ID@undefinedCaption not available.“She also has the podcast. She has some exclusive shoe dropping on Adidas. And people are gonna think I’m saying this with shade, but I’m just saying this as a point of fact is that rarely do you see someone whose career average is 8 points per game receive this level of attention,” Hill said.She continued by explaining why Cunningham has connected with audiences beyond basketball.“There’s a lot of reasons for it. One, I think she’s fiery, outspoken. She’s attractive, straight, white, and she has gotten this brand now of being Caitlin Clark’s fiercest protector… I want people to understand. I’m saying it’s a factor. I’m not saying it’s the number one reason.”Hill's comments highlighted how personality, visibility and branding can shape an athlete's public profile alongside on-court performance.Cunningham has never hidden the fact that she wants to maximize the opportunities created by her growing popularity.Her rise accelerated during the 2025 season after a confrontation involving Jacy Sheldon that ended with Cunningham being ejected while defending Clark. This year, another emotional moment, when she pointed at DeWanna Bonner during a heated exchange, quickly went viral and further boosted her mainstream recognition.Those moments opened doors beyond basketball, including television appearances and partnerships with major brands.Hill believes Cunningham understands exactly how to use that momentum.“She’s very aware of being a media darling right now and looking to capitalize on this and understands that entertainment is part of her game.”The Fever guard has openly agreed with that assessment. Speaking recently on the Sons and Daughters podcast, Cunningham explained why she is investing in opportunities outside the WNBA while she is still playing.“I am not ignorant. I know that if you use this platform, once the ball stops bouncing, you’re setting yourself up for success. And the players need to start doing that because we don’t make enough money.”At 29, Cunningham is already thinking beyond her playing career. She has built a strong presence across social media and continues to expand her portfolio through media projects, endorsements and public appearances.Whether fans admire her outspoken style or simply enjoy her competitive edge, Cunningham has become one of the WNBA's most recognizable personalities. Her journey shows that in today's sports landscape, influence is shaped not only by points on the scoreboard but also by authenticity, visibility and the ability to connect with audiences beyond the game.
Article Summary: Wnba analyst jemele hill says sophie cunningham's popularity extends far beyond her on-court production. Hill credited cunningham's outspoken personality, growing media presence and reputation as caitlin clark's fiercest defender. Cunningham agreed she is intentionally building her brand through podcasts, endorsements and public appearances.

Article Title: Jasprit Bumrah scripts never-seen-before England record with first-ball stunner
Article Text:
India's Jasprit Bumrah and teammates celebrate (ANI Photo)

England opener Ben Duckett entered the record books for an unwanted reason after becoming the first England batter ever to be dismissed off the very first ball of an innings against India in One-Day Internationals. Jasprit Bumrah needed just one delivery to provide India with the ideal start in England's chase of 234 in the second ODI at Sophia Gardens on Thursday.Bowling from over the wicket, Bumrah angled a good-length delivery across the left-handed Duckett. Looking to feel for the ball outside off stump, the opener pushed away from his body and could only edge it behind to wicketkeeper Ishan Kishan , who completed a straightforward catch.The dismissal continued Bumrah's dominance over Duckett in the series. In the opening ODI, the England opener was repeatedly troubled by the Indian pace spearhead as deliveries consistently beat his outside edge, although he managed to survive on that occasion. In Cardiff, however, Bumrah needed just one ball to end his innings.Earlier, India were bowled out for a below-par 233 in 44 overs after suffering a dramatic middle-order collapse. Virat Kohli top-scored with a fluent 65 off 66 balls, while Shreyas Iyer produced a fighting 66 from 71 deliveries. The pair added 67 runs after Kohli had earlier shared a 60-run stand with Rohit Sharma , who struggled for 26 off 47 balls.England's pace attack, led by Jofra Archer's fiery spell of 3 for 47, triggered India's collapse as the visitors lost four wickets for just 15 runs in the space of 26 deliveries. Saqib Mahmood claimed two wickets, while Gus Atkinson finished with three as India squandered a promising platform.Needing 234 for victory, England's chase got off to the worst possible start as Bumrah struck immediately, handing India early momentum and leaving Duckett with an unwanted place in the record books.
Article Summary: Ben duckett becomes the first england batter ever to be dismissed off the very first ball of an innings against india in one-day internationals. Jasprit bumrah needed just one delivery to provide india with the ideal start in england's chase of 234 in the second odi at sophia gardens.

Article Title: NBA free agency rumor: Miami Heat boss drops cryptic hint about landing LeBron James to pair with Giannis Antetokounmpo
Article Text:
LeBron James. Image via: Gary A. Vasquez-Imagn Images

Which teams are interested in LeBron James?

What is Pat Riley saying about the trade rumor?

Contract details and salary cap implications

How the trade could impact Miami Heat

Miami Heat president Pat Riley hinted at pursuing LeBron James after acquiring Giannis Antetokounmpo from Milwaukee, referencing "landing the plane" on both deals. James, 41, is an unrestricted free agent considering Miami, Golden State, Philadelphia, Cleveland, Minnesota and Denver for 2026-27. Riley called the pursuit "organic" and declined to guarantee a signing, per Thursday's introductory press conference.Riley never said the name. He didn't have to.Six teams are reportedly in the mix for James after he announced he won't return to the Los Angeles Lakers for 2026-27: the Heat, Warriors, 76ers, Cavaliers, Timberwolves and Nuggets.James has not named a favorite. He teased a decision was coming during a CNBC Boardroom panel Thursday, saying, "I won't hold you guys up too much longer," but held off announcing anything at his own podcast taping earlier that day.As per Pat Riley’s recent cryptic comment during Giannis Antetokounmpo’s official debut to the Miami Heat, the organization is making moves to land the former Lakers Star. It will mark James’ return to the franchise after 12 years.Riley described the moment Heat basketball operations chief Andy Elisburg called to confirm the Antetokounmpo trade was done. In full, Riley said: "I got a call about the trade after a month of discussion.And the call came late, and he said to me, 'We have a deal.' He closed the deal, and we both sort of screamed out loud. Yeah, we landed the plane."He then added, "There's another one we have to land," a clear nod to James.Asked directly where the Heat stand with James, Riley pumped the brakes but didn't close the door. In full: "I don't know. I really don't. To be transparent about it, we've had discussions over a week ago, maybe a week before that about it, but right now, I think we're like everybody else. We're just waiting to see what he does, and then we'll see what happens. I really can't answer that right now."No contract framework for James has been reported. His camp has kept terms private while he weighs six suitors. The Heat's flexibility depends partly on how the Antetokounmpo trade reshaped their books, though full cap numbers from that deal have not been disclosed publicly.Riley was clear that Antetokounmpo alone changes Miami's outlook. In full: "That definitely helps when you have a top-five player in the world. As far as the 24-year veteran, that is something that would happen organically." He added he's confident in the current roster regardless of James: "This is a team that we have right now, and I'm happy with it. And I think this is Spo's challenge."The next marker is James himself. He's signaled a decision is close, and Riley's Heat are one of six teams waiting to see which way he leans.
Article Summary: Miami heat president pat riley hinted at pursuing lebron james after acquiring giannis antetokounmpo from milwaukee. Riley called the pursuit "organic" and declined to guarantee a signing. James, 41, is an unrestricted free agent considering miami, golden state, philadelphia, cleveland, minnesota and denver for 2026-27.

Quick facts about Fatima Bosch

Fact Information Birthplace Teapa, Tabasco, Mexico Education Fashion Design graduate Languages Spanish and English International Title Miss Universe 2025 Known For Beauty pageantry, fashion, advocacy

Fatima Bosch has been one of the most searched beauty pageant winners in recent weeks after addressing viral dating rumors involving the England national football team and Real Madrid midfielder Jude Bellingham. The speculation quickly spread on social media, leaving fans wondering if there was any truth to the rumored connection. Bosch , who had a recent airport encounter with reporters, admitted to seeing the online chatter but made it clear she has never met the English football star.The online rumor mill may have stirred interest, but Fatima Bosch’s achievements are far greater than Internet chatter. Fashion, education, art and pageantry have been a great résumé for the Mexican beauty queen before she gets crowned Miss Universe 2025. Her inspirational journey, her advocacy and her creative pursuits have made her one of the most influential titleholders in recent memory.Fatima Bosch is a Mexican fashion designer, model, artist and beauty queen who was crowned Miss Universe 2025 after representing Mexico at the international pageant held in Thailand. Since winning the coveted title, she has gained international fame for her advocacy work, poise and inspiring personal story.The speculation was based completely on posts by fans on social media. Fans on Instagram, TikTok and X have started ‘shipping’ Bosch and Bellingham, despite no evidence the pair know each other.When asked by reporters, Bosch calmly responded to the rumors, saying she had seen the online posts but that she would have to meet Bellingham first before making any assumptions. Her funny but respectful reply soon went viral. It got millions of views on social media platforms.Unlike many beauty queens who started competing in pageants at a young age, Fatima Bosch had interests in a broad array of creative fields before stepping onto the international stage. Fashion, visual arts and public advocacy are part of her background, which contributed to the confident personality that impressed Miss Universe judges.Bosch was born in Teapa, Tabasco, Mexico. Her childhood was spent a lot in nature and in a close family environment. From a young age, she had a love of all things creative and was interested in painting, photography and fashion design.Bosch studied higher education in fashion design at Universidad Iberoamericana, Mexico City, a leading university in Mexico. Her education prepared her for a career on the international scene, combining creativity and entrepreneurship.Before winning the Miss Universe crown, Bosch had worked extensively in modeling and built her portfolio in fashion design. She had creative campaigns, artistic projects and was recognized for championing confidence, education and female empowerment.The high point of Fatima Bosch’s international stardom came when she was a contestant representing Mexico in the Miss Universe 2025 pageant held in Thailand. She impressed judges throughout the competition with her confidence, intelligence and stage presence, competing against more than 100 contestants from across the world.Before winning the world title, Bosch earned a berth to represent Mexico by winning the national competition. Her win cemented her as one of the country’s top beauty ambassadors and prepared her for the rigors of the international stage.The Miss Universe 2025 final was televised worldwide, with Bosch ultimately winning, beating out contestants from more than 100 countries and territories.Miss Universe achievementsFatima Bosch is back in the spotlight after fans on social media started linking her to England national football team and Real Madrid midfielder Jude Bellingham. The two figures had no public dealings, but the speculation increased.The rumours were trending after Bosch was stopped by reporters at an airport and asked directly about the England star. Instead of ignoring the question, she responded with a touch of humor saying that the reports were all online speculation.The rumors started with fan edits and posts on Instagram, TikTok and X. The claims were unsubstantiated, but many users praised Bosch and Bellingham and envisioned them as a couple.The dating speculation brought Fatima Bosch to a wider audience, but her standing has primarily been established through her achievements beyond the pageant world. She has spent her whole career advocating for education, creativity and women’s empowerment, inspiring young people to pursue their dreams, regardless of the personal struggles they may face.Bosch has been exploring her own interest in fashion, photography, painting, and poetry. These artistic efforts have become an important part of her public image, allowing her to bond with fans beyond the usual beauty pageants.Winning Miss Universe made Bosch a public figure worldwide, but her down-to-earth personality and well-thought-out public appearances have continued to grow her popularity.From charity events to talking about women’s empowerment to handling unexpected questions from reporters with poise, Bosch has demonstrated why she is considered one of the most powerful Miss Universe winners in recent times.Bosch clarified that she has never met Bellingham and that the dating rumors were all the work of fans online. Her legacy is much more defined by her accomplishments in fashion, art, public speaking and advocacy than by any viral social media trend. In her role as Miss Universe, Fatima Bosch continues to be an influential global ambassador whose accomplishments have been recognized on their own merits.
Article Summary: Fatima bosch is a mexican fashion designer, model, artist and beauty queen. She was crowned miss universe 2025 after representing mexico at the international pageant held in thailand. Bosch has been one of the most searched beauty pageant winners in recent weeks after addressing viral dating rumors involving real madrid midfielder jude bellingham.

Article Title: Did MS Dhoni predict the Spain vs Argentina FIFA World Cup 2026 final 10 years ago? Old Instagram post goes viral
Article Text:
Lionel Messi and MS Dhoni (Image credt: Agencies)

Dhoni's old Instagram post goes viral



Dhoni watching India vs England



NEW DELHI: Argentina's thrilling 2-1 comeback win over England in the FIFA World Cup 2026 semifinal not only sent Lionel Messi 's side into another World Cup final but also brought back an old Instagram post by former India captain MS Dhoni Within minutes of Argentina's victory, Dhoni 's 2016 Instagram post went viral on social media, leaving fans amused.Argentina will now face Spain in the World Cup final at the MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey, on Monday (July 20), with the defending champions aiming to retain the trophy.The viral post dates back to June 2016 during India's tour of Zimbabwe. In the picture, Dhoni can be seen playing PlayStation alongside Mandeep Singh, Jaydev Unadkat, Axar Patel and Karun Nair.What caught fans' attention was the caption, which simply read: "Spain vs Argentina"With Argentina now set to meet Spain in the World Cup final, the post quickly resurfaced across social media, with many fans calling it a remarkable coincidence.Dhoni was India's captain when the picture was posted.Dhoni has been following India's ongoing white-ball tour of England from the stands.The legendary wicketkeeper-batter was spotted at Edgbaston in Birmingham during the first ODI, where he watched India's six-wicket victory.Argentina eye back-to-back World Cup titlesArgentina sealed their place in the final after producing a dramatic comeback against England, with Lionel Messi providing assists for both goals.The defending champions will now take on Spain in the title clash, where they will attempt to become the first nation since Brazil in 1962 to successfully defend the FIFA World Cup title.
Article Summary: Argentina beat england 2-1 in the fifa world cup 2026 semifinal. The win sent lionel messi's side into another world cup final. Former india captain ms dhoni's old instagram post went viral on social media. The viral post dates back to june 2016 during india's tour of zimbabwe.

Article Title: Oliver Kahn calls World Cup final a 'clash of philosophies' between Spain and Argentina
Article Text:
Lionel Messi's Argentina face Lamina Yamal starrer Spain (Images: AP)

MUMBAI: Oliver Kahn was midway through explaining why Spain had become the World Cup’s most complete team when his phone rang.“Let’s get down, let’s get down to business…” blared Tiesto’s ‘The Business’. Kahn smiled, silenced the call and resumed exactly where he had left off.It was an apt soundtrack for a man whose career was built on precision and pragmatism. Yet throughout this World Cup, one question has continued to bother the legendary German goalkeeper. “How do you stop Spain?” “I always asked myself during the tournament, ‘How will you beat this team?’” said Kahn, part of Zee5’s expert panel for the FIFA World Cup . “Maybe Argentina, with their strong mentality, could do it. But overall, Spain deserve to be in the final.”For Kahn, Spain’s rise has been less about dazzling from the outset and more about peaking at the right time. “I think Spain is a typical example of how you build up during a tournament,” he said. “Sometimes it’s better to come slowly into a tournament, get better game by game, and that’s exactly what Spain did.”What has impressed him most is Spain’s evolution under Luis de la Fuente.“This is not the tiki-taka football anymore. Sometimes that football became a little bit boring because it wasn’t vertical enough.”“He refined the game. It’s more vertical. It’s more attacking.”Former England and Liverpool striker Robbie Fowler has noticed the same shift. “They’re a possession-based team, but it’s not possession for the sake of it,” Fowler said. “It’s possession with a purpose of playing forward.”That, he believes, is Spain’s best chance of stopping Lionel Messi “They’ll try to control the ball, control areas of the pitch and stop Argentina from having possession. That’s a great defensive attribute.”While the final has been billed as Messi versus teenage sensation Lamine Yamal, Kahn sees no passing of the torch. “I don’t see any rivalry. Messi is the role model of Yamal. They come from the same academy.”Yamal has impressed, he added, but “he can play much better, as he does at Barcelona where he has a little bit more freedom.”Messi, though, remains football’s ultimate problem. “We’ll all sit here and try to stop Messi,” Fowler said. “But the crux of it is you can’t because he’s Messi and he’s probably the greatest player that’s ever been.”England came closest in the semifinal before dropping deeper, allowing Messi to influence the game. “You stop Messi from getting into the pockets,” Fowler said. “But when you start dropping deep, that’s when he comes into his own.”Both legends believe modern football’s obsession with tactics and analytics should not overshadow instinct and mentality. “We should not overrate tactics,” Kahn said. “In the knockout stages you need tactics, the right players and the right mentality.”He pointed to Argentina as proof. “Everybody knows their role, but at the end you need human beings with great mentality inside your tactical system.”As a goalkeeper, Kahn also believes the final could hinge on the men between the posts. He describes Spain’s Unai Simon as calm and dependable, while Argentina’s Emiliano Martínez brings “great presence, enormous reflexes and the conviction that he is one of the best goalkeepers in the world.”Kahn knows better than most how decisive a goalkeeper can be. His mistake in the 2002 World Cup final against Brazil still lingers. “It took a long time to recover,” he admitted. “I played six and a half games perfectly without any mistakes. Then there was only one small mistake, and it was over.”Perhaps that explains why he refuses to glorify individuals. “If Martínez hadn’t made that save in the 119th minute in 2022 (WC final), Messi would not be a world champion,” Kahn said. “I’m not a friend of only talking about the superstars.”Instead, he sees Sunday’s final as a clash of footballing philosophies. “This game is a match between rational guys playing super-smart football against fully emotional, aggressive guys playing a totally different style.”And despite spending an entire tournament searching for flaws, Kahn is still left with the same question. “I’ve asked myself the whole tournament: how is Spain beatable?” On Sunday night, Argentina will try to answer it.
Article Summary: Oliver kahn believes spain deserve to be in the world cup final. The german goalkeeper has been impressed by luis de la fuente's evolution. He believes spain's best chance of stopping lionel messi is to control the ball. Former england and liverpool striker robbie fowler has noticed the same shift.

Article Title: How to get Pollo Sprite in Fortnite: Location, ability, and more
Article Text:
Pollo Sprite has been added to Fortnite (Image via Fortnite)

How to get Pollo Sprite in Fortnite

Pollo Sprite ability in Fortnite

Level Shield Regeneration Duration Level 1 6 seconds Level 2 7 seconds Level 3 8 seconds Level 4 9 seconds Level 5 10 seconds

Fortnite Sprites have featured superheroes, grim reapers, demons, and ghosts, but the v41.20 update has introduced a Sprite modelled after a pro player. Essentially, Epic Games have introduced the Pollo Sprite, modeled after Pollo, a 18-year-old American-Mexican player.Pollo is one of the most decorated competitors in Fortnite history, with multiple FNCS championships and the 2024 FNCS Global Championship title to his name. Getting a Sprite named after you is about as high an honor as a Fortnite player can receive, and the community has taken notice. Here's everything you need to know about where to find it and what it does.For players outside the competitive scene, Pollo might not be a known figure. He is basically one of the wonderkids in the Fortnite community, and he has been competitive professional since 2020. He has several titles to his name, making him a popular figure within the competitive scene.When it comes to finding the Pollo Sprite in Fortnite, you will be able to get your hands on the same by searching Rare Chests and Sprite Chests. Similar to the Vini Jr Sprite, the Pollo Sprite is Mythic rarity, making it hard to obtain.If you're specifically hunting for the Sprite, you are advised to focus on Sprite Chests, as they will provide you with the highest chances of getting the particular Sprite. Go to places with a higher concentration of the chests can help you out.If luck is not on your side, you can trade Sprites with other players or take out an opponent with the Pollo Sprite to claim it for yourself.Remember, finding the Pollo Sprite is only the first step. To unlock it permanently you have to extract it before the match ends. Take it to an Extraction Site or use a Portable Extractor if you have one available.The Pollo Sprite gives you and your teammates within range shield regeneration for a short duration after you get an elimination. It is pretty much a support ability that gives your team shields between fights. You will not have to rely solely on healing items, and will be able to get the shields back. However, keep in mind that Pollo Sprite’s effect is tied to eliminations, so it is particularly good for players who get into a lot of fights.Like all Sprites in Chapter 7 Season 3, the Pollo Sprite gets better as you level it up:At the maximum level, the Pollo Sprite gives you and your teammates 10 seconds of passive shield regeneration. This makes it among the strongest support Sprites.The jump from 6 seconds to 10 seconds at level 5 might seem small, but over the course of a match those extra seconds can restore a significant amount of shield.This was all you needed to know about the Pollo Sprite in Fortnite.
Article Summary: Pollo sprite has been added to fortnite in the v41.20 update. It is modeled after 18-year-old american-mexican player pollo. The pollo sprite gives you and your teammates within range shield regeneration for a short duration after you get an elimination. Similar to the vini jr sprite, it is mythic rarity.

Article Title: England's World Cup dream ends in silence as Argentina stun fans in London
Article Text:
Football Fans watch the Argentina v England semi-final game of the FIFA World Cup 2026 (Photo by Jo Hale/Getty Images)

LONDON: England flags were hanging in cafes, outside Asian corner shops and vape shops and even at estate agents. The pubs were the most decked out. Many had put TV screens up all around, with extra screens in beer gardens and most pubs were fully booked.Three hours before the Argentina-England semi-final, pubs started to get packed with men and women in football shirts, some draped in England flags. Many were convinced it was England’s time and she would win. But some were anxious saying Egypt had been cheated in their match against Argentina when they had a second goal controversially disallowed and their request for video review of an Argentina goal denied. This was something taxi drivers repeatedly brought up.The extremely hot weather had put everyone in a good mood though. Pubs were hoping for their biggest takings of the year. During the first half, the mood was flat with many fans grumbling that the referee was letting Argentina get away with lots of fouls and no yellow cards.“If you foul Messi, you get a yellow card straight away. Argentina are scumbags,” one fan said.Pints of beer were piled up across tables. When Anthony Gordon scored after 55 minutes, the pub I was in went wild – everyone jumped up and screamed.Young couples embraced in kisses. Loud cheers followed whenever Argentina failed to score and the mood became upbeat. But when Argentina scored their first goal, the pub fell silent. Only the sole fan in an Argentinian shirt looked smug. The men groaned and put their arms behind their heads.The rest of the game, fans watched in silence and no one was eating or drinking. “All we had to do was to hold out for 10 minutes,” one man said angrily after the Three Lions lost. TV screens came down and the pub I was in rapidly switched channels on the sole permanent screen. Another fan said: “After scoring a goal, we focused too much on defence. We weren’t in attack mode.”England head coach Thomas Tuchel’s second half substitutions when he took off the goal scorer and brought on defenders Ezri Konsa, Dan Burn and Nico O’Reilly are coming in for furious criticism. This was the third World Cup semi-final England has lost in a row. Tuchel had been brought in to get rid of England’s semifinal curse and defence-first football. “It made zero sense to me. Tactically it was astonishing, to be perfectly honest,” said former England captain Gary Lineker on ‘The Rest is Football’ podcast.Former England captain Wayne Rooney launched a scathing attack on Tuchel’s gamble. “When we got the first goal, we didn’t look to go and try and score a second goal. Far from it… the gamble Tuchel made was to go with five at the back, which allowed them to dictate the game. Then we couldn’t get out…..The decisions Thomas Tuchel made, we have to be honest on this, have cost us tonight,” he said, “Tuchel has previously... had the bravery to switch things around. But here the head coach appeared as frozen as his players, bringing on Burn and O’Reilly instead of ripping up the script to introduce some of the attacking alternatives when it was clear the tide was not turning,” football journalist Ron Walker wrote.As if to rub salt into England’s wounds, Argentina’s players unfurled a banner on the pitch with the message: “The Falklands are Argentinian” – even though political messaging is banned at matches. “The World Cup might not be ours, but the Falkland Islands definitely are,” a spokesperson for the UK prime minister said.
Article Summary: Three hours before the argentina-england semi-final, pubs started to get packed with men and women in football shirts. Many were convinced it was england’s time and she would win. But some were anxious saying egypt had been cheated in their match against argentina when they had a second goal controversially disallowed.

Article Title: 'Hasn't scored in two games': India coach drops verdict on Rohit Sharma amid poor form
Article Text:
Rohit Sharma

ALSO READ:

India batting coach Sitanshu Kotak backed Rohit Sharma despite the opener's poor returns in the ongoing ODI series against England, saying there is no pressure on a player of his stature and that he could produce a different innings in the series decider at Lord's.Rohit's struggles were visible in the second ODI in Cardiff on Thursday, where England won by four wickets to level the three-match series 1-1. The opener never looked settled, scoring just 10 runs off 18 balls by the end of the Powerplay even as India raced to 61/1. He eventually made 26 off 47 balls before being dismissed while attempting a sweep against Will Jacks.Rohit has not enjoyed the best run in ODIs this year. In eight matches, he has managed only one half-century and is averaging 30.12. With speculation growing over whether the selectors could move on from the former India captain ahead of the 2027 ODI World Cup, Kotak was asked after the Cardiff defeat if Rohit's place could come under scrutiny after Sunday's final ODI."I don't think a player as big as Rohit can feel the pressure," Kotak said after the match."He's too good a player to feel that. Yes he hasn't scored in two games. I don't think that makes any difference.But today also it looked like he'll get a good innings but that's okay [that he didn't get a big score]."While Rohit found it difficult to get going, captain Shubman Gill made a quick start before falling for 31 off 30 balls. Virat Kohli also began positively, striking three boundaries in his first 11 deliveries as England's bowlers struggled with their lengths early on a pitch that offered some variable bounce.Kotak rejected the suggestion that Rohit was struggling and said the opener could bounce back in the final ODI at Lord's."On a [given] day, there are a lot of batters I have seen, they don't get that momentum what they are looking for, and that can happen," Kotak said."You might see [a] completely different innings from Rohit Sharma in Lord's. I wouldn't use the word struggling, but maybe the shots he normally plays on the up, which is because of the double bounce, probably he felt it was not comfortable."Shubman got a quick start, then Virat got a quick start, but he [Rohit] probably didn't get balls in his slot."You could definitely see a completely different innings from a player like Rohit and I have seen that happening to a lot of batters. So it's not just Rohit. I wouldn't use the word he was struggling."India looked set for a bigger total after reaching 178/3, with Kohli scoring 65 and Shreyas Iyer top-scoring with 66. However, the innings lost momentum after Kohli's dismissal as India slipped to 193/7 before finishing on 233.England chased down the target with four wickets in hand to level the three-match ODI series 1-1. The decider will be played at Lord's on Sunday.
Article Summary: India coach sitanshu kotak says there is no pressure on rohit sharma. Sharma has struggled in the ongoing odi series against england. England won the second odi in cardiff by four wickets to level the series 1-1. The decider will be played at lord's on sunday.

Article Title: Viral 2021 tweet predicting Argentina vs Spain World Cup final resurfaces ahead of Messi vs Lamine Yamal clash
Article Text:
Argentina vs Pain World Cup final prediction (Getty Images)

What did the viral 2021 tweet about the 2026 World Cup actually say?

Did the 'time traveler' behind the tweet respond after Argentina reached the final?

How did Argentina and Spain qualify for the 2026 World Cup final?

What makes the Argentina vs Spain 2026 World Cup final even bigger than the prediction?

A five-year-old post on X has become one of the most talked-about storylines of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The tweet, posted by @actuallyimthe in July 2021, predicted that Argentina would beat Spain 3-2 in the 2026 World Cup final – an outcome that has now cleared its second-to-last hurdle. Argentina beat England 2-1 in Atlanta on Wednesday, with Lionel Messi assisting both goals as Enzo Fernandez and Lautaro Martinez scored late to complete the comeback. With both finalists confirmed, only the scoreline is left to decide.The post reads simply: "Argentina just beat Spain at the 2026 World Cup final, 3-2." At the time it was published, it barely registered. Nobody paid it much attention. It was just another random guess buried in the timeline. Then Spain beat France 2-0 in the semi-finals, confirming their place in Sunday's final at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey. That is when the internet went looking for it.The post has since accumulated over 151,000 likes and tens of thousands of reposts. Reactions ranged from genuine disbelief to dark humour. One user asked, "How did he know?" Another went straight for the jugular: "You tweeted this before World Cup 2022, who's your source please?" The user behind the account goes by "dilemma," has a profile photo of the Disney character Stitch, and joined Twitter in 2017, with the account seemingly dedicated to gaming content.Nothing about it screams prophet.But the internet does not care about context right now. It cares about the score.The user, who had last tweeted on December 12, 2025, returned after Argentina's win over England by replying to their own viral tweet with only a watch emoji. Their reply sparked a wave of reactions, with one user writing they hoped "the guy that made this tweet is still alive."The account also shared a screenshot of another earlier prediction - from the account Isaiah (@fcbfootballblog), posted on July 3, 2019 - which read: "39-year-old Messi to lift his second consecutive Cup in 2026, you heard it here first." Messi turns 39 on June 24. He is currently 39. The layers keep stacking.Some users have pushed back on the mystique. A more sceptical voice pointed out: "It's a bait account. They post hundreds of predictions of plausible events and whenever one of them happens in the future, they delete all the others so they appear to be some miraculous prediction god." That explanation is entirely possible. It also makes for a far less interesting Sunday.Argentina came into Wednesday's semi-final as defending champions, and delivered the kind of performance that has become their calling card at this tournament. England led through Anthony Gordon before Messi orchestrated a late turnaround, setting up Enzo Fernandez in the 85th minute and then crossing for Lautaro Martinez to head home the winner deep in stoppage time.It was the fourth straight knockout game in which Argentina survived a close call. Coach Lionel Scaloni said afterwards: "I think that this team plays the best when we are facing a difficult situation, with adversity. We had a challenging game, a challenging situation. There was blood in the water, and we went for it."Spain's route to the final was less dramatic but no less convincing. They beat France 2-0 in the other semi-final, with Marc Cucurella solid at the back and Luis de la Fuente's side controlling proceedings from start to finish. It will be their second World Cup final appearance, having won the trophy once before, in South Africa in 2010.The final at MetLife Stadium on Sunday carries storylines that go well beyond a viral tweet. Messi, 39, faces Spain's 18-year-old phenom Lamine Yamal in what may be one of the most generationally loaded World Cup finals in memory. There is also a now-famous photograph of Messi cradling a six-month-old baby Yamal at a UNICEF event in 2007 - a picture that has circulated widely this tournament, framing the final as something almost scripted.Argentina enter Sunday as underdogs, priced at +125 to lift the trophy, with Spain favoured at -175. That is a slight shift from where the tournament began, where Spain were considered one of the stronger sides from the outset.Whether @actuallyimthe turns out to be a lucky guesser, a shrewd football analyst, or something the internet will insist was a time traveller, the 2026 World Cup final now has a subplot that few tournaments can match. A five-word tweet from 2021 might just become football's most unlikely prophecy. Or it might not. That is what Sunday is for.
Article Summary: A five-year-old tweet has become one of the most talked-about storylines of the 2026 fifa world cup. The tweet, posted by @actuallyimthe in july 2021, predicted that argentina would beat spain 3-2. The post has since accumulated over 151,000 likes and tens of thousands of reposts.

Article Title: "That roast was brutal": Hilarious jab at Jake Paul at the ESPYs leaves fans in a frenzy
Article Text:
Jake ​Paul. Image via: Megan Briggs/ Getty Images​

Jake Paul gets hilariously roasted at the ESPYs

Fans react to Mercello Hernández's Jake Paul roast

Jake Paul admits fighting Anthony Joshua was a mistake

Jake Paul hints at next opponent

Mercello Hernández didn't need long to find his target at the 2026 ESPYs. During a nearly 10-minute opening monologue, the 28-year-old comedian turned his sights on Jake Paul 's well-documented pattern of fighting opponents well past their prime, drawing one of the biggest reactions of the night.Hernández, hosting the ceremony in New York, spent the monologue working through a list of recent sports headlines, including Tiger Woods' DUI incident and callbacks to previous host Shane Gillis. But it was the Paul material that landed hardest with the crowd.Hernández built the joke around Paul's tendency to fight aging boxers, framing it as a mock warning before turning the bit on his own family. He opened with a backhanded compliment about the night's guest list, then pivoted straight into the setup. "Jake, that's just a joke. Don't fight me," Hernández said, before delivering the punchline aimed at his own relatives.Rather than reacting poorly, Paul appeared to take the joke in stride, laughing through the segment rather than pushing back, according to the brief's account of the broadcast.The joke spread quickly online. One fan account, @Mufcmilitant1, posted that the ESPYs "really don't hold back" and that Paul "walked right into that one."Another user, @Vision33X, joked that Paul's fight resume "reads like an aarp newsletter."@Sionainnagins piled on with a bit about Paul "collecting father figures like Pokémon cards."Not every reaction focused purely on comedy. @SwaydayWrestlin referenced the toll of Paul's fight with Anthony Joshua, writing that Joshua "rearranged his entire smile" and questioning how the bout was sanctioned in the first place.@agentmma summed up the moment bluntly, saying Paul "got cooked in front of everybody, no comeback to that one."The Joshua fight has loomed over Paul's career since it broke his jaw last December, sidelining him from fighting or sparring since. Speaking with Pat McAfee, Paul confirmed he's still working his way back and expects to be cleared to spar soon.He acknowledged the Joshua matchup was a step too far, saying his focus going forward will be different. "I just probably won't fight Olympic gold medal heavyweights anymore," Paul said, adding that he's already in talks with multiple potential opponents.Among the names Paul floated is Brock Lesnar, who turns 49 this year and hasn't recorded a competitive MMA win since 2010. Paul pointed to his own wrestling background as justification for the matchup, saying he wrestled Division I in Ohio. A rematch scenario with Nate Diaz, whom Paul beat by boxing decision in August 2023, also remains on the table according to Paul's comments.Whether either fight materializes remains unclear, but for now, Paul's résumé of opponents well beyond their athletic peak continues to follow him, punchlines and all.
Article Summary: Mercello hernández roasted jake paul at the 2026 espys. The comedian focused on paul's history of fighting opponents well past their prime. Paul appeared to take the joke in stride, laughing through the segment.

Article Title: 'Was really struggling': England's Jude Bellingham opens up after 1-2 defeat against Argentina
Article Text:
Jude Bellingham urges England fans to stay united (Image: X

Argentina reach back-to-back FIFA World Cup Final

England and Real Madrid midfielder Jude Bellingham has broken his silence following England's heartbreaking 2-1 defeat to Argentina in the FIFA World Cup 2026 semifinal, urging supporters to remain united despite the disappointment. Bellingham enjoyed an outstanding World Cup campaign, finishing as England's top scorer with six goals and one assist. However, he was unable to add to his tally in the semifinal as the Three Lions suffered another painful exit.Reflecting on the defeat in an emotional Instagram post, the 23-year-old thanked fans for their unwavering support and called on the nation to carry forward the unity shown throughout the tournament."Was really struggling to find the right words for yesterday and the last few weeks but this pretty much hits the nail on the head from our driver in Kansas. Thank you for the unbelievable support from back home and to those who spent their hard earned money to travel to America and get behind us. Don't let the unity and love we've seen in our country end with this campaign. When we're together we can achieve big things... And we will! Love yous!" Bellingham wrote.Argentina defeated England 2-1 in a dramatic FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-final on Wednesday, July 15, 2026, at Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium. Lionel Messi orchestrated a stunning late comeback with two critical assists, shattering England's dreams of reaching their first World Cup final since 1966.After a fiercely contested and goalless first half, England took the lead in the 55th minute when Anthony Gordon finished off a Morgan Rogers cross following good build-up play from Harry Kane. However, Thomas Tuchel's decision to switch to a defensive five-man backline invited sustained Argentine pressure. Lionel Messi punished England's retreat by setting up Enzo Fernández for a stunning long-range equaliser in the 85th minute before producing another moment of brilliance in stoppage time, delivering a pinpoint cross for Lautaro Martínez to head home the winner after Alexis Mac Allister's shot struck the post, completing Argentina's dramatic 2-1 comeback.
Article Summary: England lost 2-1 to argentina in the fifa world cup 2026 semifinal. Lionel messi orchestrated a stunning late comeback with two critical assists. Real madrid midfielder jude bellingham thanked fans for their unwavering support. The 23-year-old called on the nation to carry forward the unity shown throughout the tournament.

Article Title: Rift between Virat Kohli and Gautam Gambhir? India coach gives blunt 'no bridge needed' response on speculation
Article Text:
Virat Kohli and head coach Gautam Gambhir,

India batting coach Sitanshu Kotak has dismissed speculation of a rift between Virat Kohli and head coach Gautam Gambhir , saying the two are in regular communication and that there is no issue in their working relationship.Rumours about Kohli and Gambhir's equation gained momentum on social media after visuals from India's training sessions during the ODI series against England showed the two not interacting. The speculation has continued ever since Kohli announced his retirement from Test cricket last year.Ahead of the first ODI at Edgbaston, Kohli was seen batting in the nets while Gambhir watched from close range without speaking to him. Kotak, meanwhile, was spotted having a conversation with the former India captain, adding to the online discussion.However, Kotak made it clear there was nothing unusual about the situation and laughed off suggestions that someone needed to act as a bridge between the two."No (laughs), Virat and Gautam would've spoken about 10 times today. I don't think that needs any bridge," Kotak said.He also explained what he and Kohli had discussed during the practice session before the opening ODI."Basically before he went out to bat, he spoke a few things to me. Honestly as a batting coach, unless he feels something or spots something major, his batting shouldn't be disturbed and he shouldn't be told much. But he asked me certain things before regarding his footwork and after the nets, he was talking [to me]."Apart from that, I don't know where the rumours come from, but they do," Kotak said.Kotak also backed Rohit Sharma , who has struggled for runs in the ongoing ODI series against England.Rohit's difficulties continued in the second ODI in Cardiff on Thursday, where England won by four wickets to level the three-match series 1-1. The opener managed just 10 runs off 18 balls in the Powerplay despite India reaching 61/1, before being dismissed for 26 off 47 balls while attempting a sweep against Will Jacks.Rohit has not enjoyed the best run in ODIs this year. In eight matches, he has scored only one half-century and averages 30.12. With speculation over whether the selectors could move on from the former India captain ahead of the 2027 ODI World Cup, Kotak was asked if Rohit's place would come under scrutiny after Sunday's series decider at Lord's.The batting coach said there was no pressure on the veteran opener."I don't think a player as big as Rohit can feel the pressure," Kotak said after the Cardiff match."He's too good a player to feel that. Yes he hasn't scored in two games. I don't think that makes any difference. But today also it looked like he'll get a good innings but that's okay [that he didn't get a big score]."
Article Summary: Virat kohli and gautam gambhir are in regular communication, says sitanshu kotak. Kotak also backed rohit sharma, who has struggled for runs in the ongoing odi series against england. England won the second odi by four wickets to level the three-match series 1-1.

Article Title: Heartbroken Harry Kane vows England will 'go again' after FIFA World Cup exit
Article Text:
England's Harry Kane (AP Photo/Lynne Sladky)

Argentina into the finals

England captain Harry Kane has shared an emotional message for the Three Lions' supporters following the team's heartbreaking exit from the FIFA World Cup 2026 at the hands of Argentina in the semifinals. Kane enjoyed an impressive tournament, finishing with six goals and one assist in seven matches. Despite his prolific campaign, the 32-year-old admitted he was devastated after England narrowly missed out on another World Cup finaIn a heartfelt post on X on Friday, Kane described the defeat as one of the toughest moments of his career, saying England had come agonisingly close but ultimately fell short despite giving everything throughout the seven-week campaign. Notably, England reached the quarterfinals at the 2022 FIFA World Cup after finishing fourth in 2018, before progressing to the semifinals in the 2026 edition."No words are big enough right now to overcome this empty feeling in the stomach. We were close, really close to another final but it wasn’t enough. We’ve given everything over these last 7 weeks and to fall short is hard to take! I know the expectations are high and rightly so.We’ve been knocking on the door for eight years now but again are missing that final piece of the jigsaw. That’s where we have to go away, process it and find a way to get better. I’m so proud of the boys and what we have shown throughout this tournament—some tough games and tough environments that we have overcome.Some memories will stay with us players, and I’m sure with you fans, for a long, long time. Going for glory doesn’t always mean you will get it. You have to fight for it, get knocked down, pick yourself up and go again, and that’s what we will do. There’s no other way but to keep believing and keep pushing. Thank you to every single fan who travelled and supported us in the stadiums. Thank you to everyone back home for believing in us. Thank you to the players and staff for everything you have given. As always, win or lose, we learn and go again," Harry Kane wrote on X.Argentina defeated England 2-1 in a dramatic FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-final on Wednesday, July 15, 2026, at Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium. Lionel Messi orchestrated a stunning late comeback with two critical assists, shattering England's dreams of reaching their first World Cup final since 1966.
Article Summary: England lost 2-1 to argentina in the fifa world cup 2026 semi-final. Harry kane has shared an emotional message for the three lions' supporters. The england captain described the defeat as one of the toughest moments of his career. Kane enjoyed an impressive tournament, finishing with six goals and one assist.

Article Title: Meet the 8 new Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders rookies who are ready to become “America’s Sweethearts”
Article Text:
Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders rookies for 2026-27 season (Netflix)

Meet the 2026-27 Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders rookies

1.

Savanna Dastrup

2.

Emily Awbrey

3. Amiyah Naulls

4. Haley Bogdon

5. Lexi Smith

6. Aubrey Rogers

7. Brianne Lindenau

8. Kate Rogge

The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders officially unveiled their 2026-27 roster in mid-July 2026, and eight new faces have earned their stars. The announcement came via the team's official Instagram with the caption, "Officially earned their stars. Introducing your 2026-2027 Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders!" Since Netflix's *America's Sweethearts: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders* debuted in June 2024, the audition process has become must-watch content. Some of this year's rookies tried and failed before. Others are fresh arrivals. All eight have one thing in common: they made it.Yes, and for fans of Season 3, this one hits differently. Dastrup had been working toward this dream for years. She made it to training camp for the 2025-26 squad, only to be cut before the final roster was set.What made her story stand out was what happened after. She went directly to DCC director Kelli Finglass and head choreographer Judy Trammell and asked them straight: did she have a real shot if she came back? Finglass didn't sugarcoat it but didn't shut the door either. "You might just chalk this up to timing and experience and the pressure," Finglass told her."But I think you've got the skills to make this team or another team. "Dastrup, a Utah native and former Texas Christian University cheerleader, took that as a green light. She returned in 2026 and made the squad. Her reaction on Instagram said everything: "This is an absolute dream come true!! I am so excited and am so so grateful for this opportunity!!! go cowboys!! 🥹💙🌟."Emily Awbrey had all the technical credentials when she first auditioned in 2025. Finglass called her "one of the strongest dance technicians in the entire audition." And yet, she was cut.The Oregon native's background was in cruise ship performances, which gave her strong fundamentals but left her adjusting to the pom-style dance that defines DCC. Finglass was honest: she was a personal favorite, but the style hadn't clicked yet. "I hope you do consider re-auditioning," Finglass told her, adding she would be "disappointed if you don't try out again."Awbrey promised she'd be back. She was. This time, she made it through training camp and onto the final roster. Her Instagram reaction? "I'm genuinely speechless. No words can describe this 💙."Amiyah Naulls comes in with strong collegiate credentials. She was part of the dance team at California State University, Fullerton, and also completed one of DCC's Prep Intensives before her audition. While working toward her degree, she has been teaching dance on the side.Making the squad clearly meant a great deal. "Like someone pinch me!! What an honor!! 🥹❤️," she wrote on Instagram after the roster was announced.Bogdon brings a somewhat unexpected combination to the squad. She graduated from the University of Arkansas in December 2025, where she was both a dance team member and sorority participant. She is also a registered nurse.After making the 2026-27 team, she shared the DCC announcement on her Instagram Stories: "I can't believe I'm a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader!!!!! I am so honored and grateful to be living my dream."Lexi Smith joins the squad fresh from the University of Central Florida, where she was part of the cheer team. The timing here is remarkable: she graduated just two months before landing a spot on one of the most recognized cheer squads in the world.She described the moment on her Instagram Stories as feeling "beyond blessed."Rogers is making a league switch that very few people can claim.
